label: Offensive Security
description: Penetration testing, exploit development, red teaming, and adversarial simulation across networks, applications, and systems.

label: Digital Forensics & Incident Response
description: Digital forensics, memory and mobile forensics, incident response, malware analysis, and threat hunting across enterprise and cloud environments.

label: Defensive Security / SOC
description: Security operations, SOC analysis, SIEM operations, detection engineering, and endpoint detection and response platforms.

label: Cloud Security
description: Cloud security architecture, AWS/Azure/GCP security engineering, container security, Zero Trust, and cloud-native security operations.

label: Application Security
description: Web application penetration testing, secure software development lifecycle, DevSecOps, API security, and software supply chain security.

label: Threat Intelligence
description: Cyber threat intelligence analysis, threat actor profiling, TTP analysis, IOC management, and intelligence platform operations.

label: Vulnerability Management
description: Vulnerability scanning, risk-based prioritization, remediation tracking, and enterprise vulnerability management program design.

label: Network Security
description: Network security engineering, firewall administration, IDS/IPS, VPNs, and network security architecture across major vendors.

label: Security Architecture & Engineering
description: Enterprise security architecture, security engineering, Zero Trust design, cryptography, and security program leadership.

label: Identity & Access Management
description: Identity governance, privileged access management, authentication and MFA, federation, SSO, and identity platform administration.

label: OT / ICS / IoT Security
description: Operational technology security, industrial control systems, SCADA security, critical infrastructure protection, and IoT security.

label: Governance, Risk & Compliance
description: IT audit, risk management, compliance frameworks, business continuity, third-party risk, and information security governance.

label: Data Security & Privacy
description: Privacy law and compliance, GDPR, privacy engineering, data loss prevention, data classification, and privacy program management.

label: AI Security
description: AI/ML system security, LLM red teaming, AI governance and risk, adversarial machine learning, and responsible AI frameworks.

label: Oversight & Leadership
description: CISO and executive leadership, security program management, security awareness, and board-level security governance.
